message:
🐛 Fix copilot-setup-steps preview server hanging

The preview server step was blocking the Copilot agent for 16+ minutes.
Changed nohup npm to direct npx vite, added timeout-minutes: 2,
and reduced poll attempts from 15 to 10. The step now completes
in under 30s so the agent can start coding.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -36,18 +36,21 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Start local preview server
         working-directory: web
+        timeout-minutes: 2
         run: |
           # Start vite preview in background so Copilot can test against localhost
-          nohup npm run preview -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4173 &
-          echo "Preview server starting on http://localhost:4173"
-          # Wait for it to be ready
-          for i in $(seq 1 15); do
-            if curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:4173 | grep -q 200; then
+          npx vite preview --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4173 &
+          PREVIEW_PID=$!
+          echo "Preview server starting (PID $PREVIEW_PID) on http://localhost:4173"
+          # Wait up to 20s for it to be ready, then move on regardless
+          for i in $(seq 1 10); do
+            if curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:4173 2>/dev/null | grep -q 200; then
               echo "Preview server is ready"
               break
             fi
             sleep 2
           done
+          echo "Setup complete — preview server running in background"
 
       # --- Go / Backend ---
       - name: Setup Go 1.23
